SELECT      CASE          WHEN c1.Segment = 'SME' AND c2.Segment = 'LAM' THEN AVG(y1.Consumption) - AVG(y2.Consumption)         WHEN c1.Segment = 'LAM' AND c2.Segment = 'KAM' THEN AVG(y2.Consumption) - AVG(y3.Consumption)         WHEN c1.Segment = 'KAM' AND c2.Segment = 'SME' THEN AVG(y3.Consumption) - AVG(y1.Consumption)     END AS ConsumptionDifference FROM      yearmonth y1 JOIN      customers c1 ON y1.CustomerID = c1.CustomerID JOIN      yearmonth y2 ON y1.CustomerID = y2.CustomerID JOIN      customers c2 ON y2.CustomerID = c2.CustomerID JOIN      transactions_1k t ON y1.CustomerID = t.CustomerID WHERE      strftime('%Y', y1.Date) = '2013'      AND c1.Currency = 'CZK'     AND c1.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM') GROUP BY      c1.Segment, c2.Segment HAVING      AVG(y1.Consumption) = (SELECT MIN(Consumption) FROM yearmonth WHERE strftime('%Y', Date) = '2013' AND Currency = 'CZK' AND Segment = c1.Segment)     AND AVG(y2.Consumption) = (SELECT MIN(Consumption) FROM yearmonth WHERE strftime('%Y', Date) = '2013' AND Currency = 'CZK' AND Segment = c2.Segment)	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT Segment,         SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2012' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS Consumption_2012,        SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2013' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS Consumption_2013,        (SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2013' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END) -          SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2012' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100.0 /          NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2012' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END), 0) AS Percentage_Increase FROM yearmonth JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID WHERE Currency = 'EUR' GROUP BY Segment ORDER BY Percentage_Increase DESC	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
SELECT SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = 6 AND Date BETWEEN '2013-08-01' AND '2013-11-30'	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
